changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Create Virology and Vaccine Unit notebook template

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete virology and vaccine production workflow from sample intake through virus culture to vaccine development

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Virology and Vaccine Production Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Virology and Vaccine Unit notebook template with 3 predefined workflow pages: Sample Intake and Registration, Virus Culture Growth, and Vaccine Development.

delete.where: title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Intake and Registration page for Virology notebook (Stage 1)

column.name: instructions
column.value: Sample Arrival: Receive pre-labeled or labeled samples (clinical specimens or research samples). Registration: Enter metadata (Sample ID, Source, Type, Date/time), assign test type (Viral or Bacterial testing), link to project/study if applicable.

column.name: content
column.value: Stage 1: Sample Intake and Registration - Sample arrival verification and metadata entry

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Virus Culture Growth page for Virology notebook (Stage 2)

column.name: instructions
column.value: In-Lab Process Steps: 1) Media Preparation - Log materials (type, lot number, expiry). 2) Sterilization - Record parameters (temp, time, pressure). 3) Cell Culture - Track cell line, passage number, growth conditions. 4) Quality Control - Log viability %, sterility pass/fail. 5) Virus Culture - Record virus strain, culture conditions (temp, CO2, duration). 6) Dark Room Imaging - Store image data, CPE observation, fluorescence intensity. 7) Formulation - Document stabilizers, preservatives, concentrations. 8) Feeding - Log feeding schedule, reagents. 9) Packaging - Track batch ID, packaging specs (vial type, fill volume, labeling).

column.name: content
column.value: Stage 2: Virus Culture Growth (In-Lab) - Complete virus culture process from media preparation to packaging

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Vaccine Development page for Virology notebook (Stage 3)

column.name: instructions
column.value: Partially External Process: 1) Virus Isolation - Link to culture batch ID. 2) Titer Measurement - Record titer values (TCID50, PFU/ml, etc.). 3) Genome Sequencing - Store sequence data (FASTA files, GenBank accession). 4) Seed Virus Production - Document selection criteria, seed virus batch ID. 5) Preclinical Trials (external) - Track trial initiation date, animal species, outcomes (immunogenicity, safety). 6) Clinical Trials (external) - Link trial phases (Phase I/II/III), outcomes, regulatory submissions. Note: Preclinical and clinical trials conducted outside lab but must be referenced in LMIS for traceability.

column.name: content
column.value: Stage 3: Vaccine Development (Partially External) - From virus isolation through clinical trials

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3
